_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Omni Discord Bot
author: omni@example.com
description: A modular, addon-based Discord bot built with TypeScript. Every feature is a plugin — from moderation to economy to custom integrations.
startup: npm install -g pnpm && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm build && node packages/core/dist/index.js

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt update
apt install -y git curl

curl -fsSL https://get.pnpm.io/install.sh | sh -
export PNPM_HOME="/root/.local/share/pnpm"
export PATH="$PNPM_HOME:$PATH"

if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "Skipping Git clone — using user-uploaded files."
else
    if [ -z "${GIT_REPO}" ]; then
        echo "Error: No Git repository provided and USER_UPLOAD is not enabled."
        exit 1
    fi

    if [ -d "/mnt/server/.git" ]; then
        cd /mnt/server
        git pull
    else
        git clone ${GIT_REPO} /mnt/server
    fi
fi

cd /mnt/server
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
pnpm build

if [ ! -f "/mnt/server/.env" ] && [ -f "/mnt/server/.env.example" ]; then
    cp /mnt/server/.env.example /mnt/server/.env
fi

echo "Installation complete."

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: The Git repository URL to clone Omni from.

variables.name: User Upload
variables.description: Set to true if uploading files manually instead of cloning from Git.

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Your Discord bot token from the Discord Developer Portal.

variables.name: Discord Client ID
variables.description: Your Discord application's client ID for slash command deployment.

variables.name: Dev Guild ID
variables.description: Optional guild ID for instant slash command updates during development.

variables.name: Log Level
variables.description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warn, or error.
